title: Week-End with Father
writer: George W. George, Joseph Hoffman, George F. Slavin
actors: Van Heflin, Patricia Neal, Gigi Perreau
plot: Single parents Jean Bowen and Brad Stubbs meet at the train station when they send their kids (his two girls, her two boys) off to camp. Love inevitably blooms. But there are complications: Brad's other flame, TV star Phyllis, thi...
